name: Soulforge Aptitude
descriptionTemplate:
This talent is only effective in the {Astral Reign} stages.
This Awakener's CON, ATK, and DEF are increase by [Arg1]%, and they gain [Arg2] Keyflare upon their first {Rouse}.
Sorel gains Temporary {STR} equal to [Arg3]% of her ATK after {Devour}, triggering a maximum of 5 times per turn.
